Video.summary: Regina tells her daughter, Angela, that she is getting married to her ex-boyfriend! Next Suzanne is tired of her boyfriend complaining about her job as an exotic entertainer. Then Tanya is here to tell Bryan's wife about their affair.
Video.title: My Mom's Marrying My Man!

Video.summary: Kim says her husband of 7 years became possessive, lazy and demanding. So she got her revenge by sleeping with his father, Daniel! Later Chris is a player who's dating 2 women at the same time and they are not happy about it!
Video.title: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Image.alt: I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!
I'm Cheating With Your Dad And Sister!

Video.summary: Bonnie says she has been sleeping with her daughters girlfriend. Next, Akeem wants to confess to his girlfriend about his shocking affair. Then, Nick is ready to come clean about why he will only have sex with the lights off.
Video.title: Wicked Confessions

Video.summary: Brittany's got a bone to pick with Brandi, a stripper that keeps getting in the way of her happiness. Then Jeremy finally found a girl just like dear old mom, but too bad mom is a stripper, and hence girlfriend Jessica is too.
Video.title: Stripper Tales

Video.summary: TiTi made a big mistake when she hooked up with her cousin's man Damo. Then, Ryan and Kristy are engaged, but Ryan says he wants to stop their upcoming nuptials because he slept with Kristy's sister Kayla.
Video.title: Men Show No Mercy

Video.summary: After their sex life hit the dumps, Andrew searched for satisfaction and found it with his girlfriends sister! Then Desi will do anything to keep Melissa from leaving her behind, but sleeping with her cousin was not something she planned on!
Video.title: Your Sister Gave It Up!

Video.summary: Jon is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating on her with her brother! Next Kelly will dump her boyfriend for her secret lover, Bart. Then Malikah will tell her fiancé that she's had a secret lover for the past 3 years!
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!

Video.summary: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.
Video.title: Stay Out of My Threesome!

Video.summary: Katrina says that her emotional needs are not being met, so she started cheating with Michaell, a drag queen. Then John explains to his girlfriend that he has recently acquired a female "indentured servant."
Video.title: Stunning Secrets Revealed!

Video.summary: SpringerCam joins Sam on a trucking trip where he professes his love and devotion for two women. Then Edward is here to confess to his wife that he's been having an affair with her sister! When the two sisters confront Edward, he's goin' home alone!
Video.title: I'm Leaving My Wife!

Video.summary: After seven years of marriage and four kids, Evren and Crystal are still cheating on each other. Can their future really look any brighter! Then Sarah's not about to lose her first love Jeremy, but his cheating ways are reaching a boiling point!
Video.title: Face It...I Don't Want You!

Video.summary: A man finds out his wife is having sex with their son-in-law; a man cheats with one of his girlfriend's best friends; a man suspects his girlfriend is cheating with his friend.
Video.title: A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid

Image.alt: A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid
A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid
A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid

Video.summary: Paris began prostituting at 11 years old and has continued for the last 10 years. She says she didn't like living by her moms rules so she left home and turned to prostitution to make money and take care of herself. Special guest host, Steve Wilkos is here to help her turn her life around.
Video.title: Steve Help Me Stop Prostituting

Video.summary: Tashe wants the truth about her boyfriend and another woman; Frank has a revelation that will turn his girlfriend's world upside down; Passion wonders if she should give her boyfriend a threesome.
Video.title: Turned Down for ... What?!

Video.summary: Cheyenne says her boyfriend has cheated far too many times; Chanti blames her boyfriend's behavior on social media; Selina hates her brother's ex-girlfriend.
Video.title: Secret T.H.O.T.S

Video.summary: Alex says he was forced into his relationship with his girlfriend, and he has a secret to reveal; two women wrestle in applesauce for Lexi's love; Tai has moved from Atlanta to Ohio to be with his baby-mama, but she has a confession to make.
Video.title: Fall Flings

Video.summary: Alex, who left his girlfriend while she was pregnant, wants her back; Ciarra faces Trice's wrath for sleeping with her boyfriend.
Video.title: Halloween: I'm Sorry Boo

Video.summary: A woman wants the truth from her sister and boyfriend; a woman must decide between two men; a woman hooks up with her friend's boyfriend.
Video.title: My Stripper Sister Strikes Again

Video.summary: Kassi is here because she can't believe that her ex-boyfriend left her for their roommate. Then it's a sister show down when these two go head to head for the love of the same man. Plus, Bryan's girlfriend Brandy is here to tell him a secret.
Video.title: Triple Ex!

Video.summary: Sparks fly as Victoria confronts the man who stole her man! Can cash strapped Stacy win Janelle back from Big?
Video.title: Cheating Secrets Explode

Video.summary: Meet Taz and others with this bizarre lifestyle: adult babies. They wear diapers and drink milk from a bottle.
Video.title: Adult Babies

Video.summary: Nikki reveals her secret brotherly affairs. “Six O’Clock” has been sleeping with her friend's man for money!
Video.title: I Slept With 3 Brothers

Video.summary: Bill wants his wife to live with him and his girlfriend. Courtney confronts her fiancé about his mistress.
Video.title: I Live With My Wife And Girlfriend

Image.alt: I Live With My Wife And Girlfriend
I Live With My Wife And Girlfriend
I Live With My Wife And Girlfriend

Video.summary: Trey's 2 lovers finally meet. Tina discovers her man cheated with her cousin! Mary Kay wants her ex back!
Video.title: My Lover Is A Cheat!

Video.summary: Bob wears diapers every day, even on dates. We spent a day with Bob to see how he functions all day.
Video.title: Diaper Bob

Video.summary: Holiday food fights, proposals, poetry and North Pole dancers, this episode has it all.
Video.title: Holiday Hell #357

Video.summary: Crystal found evidence to believe that Chad may really be stepping out on their marriage. Then, Shanna is here to confront her boyfriend Kevin because she has evidence to believe that he's been sleeping with other women!
Video.title: Cheaters Put On Blast

Video.summary: They say that money makes the world go round. These guests say that they make money by laying on their backs!
Video.title: Prostitutes Tell All

Video.summary: Rich and Dreama, bribed Dreama's sister, Tabby, to have sex with them before they would baby-sit her children so she could go to work at her local go go club. Then Steve is tired of supporting his daughter, Christy, and her lazy boyfriend.
Video.title: Country Lovin'!

Video.summary: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but what Callie doesn't know is that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.
Video.title: Invasion of the Angry Lovers

Video.summary: Kiki taught Kat the ropes whens he started in the strip clubs and then they became lovers. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to join him in a threesome with his secret lover, Eric!
Video.title: Two-timers Confronted

Video.summary: Insecure Star likes Deandre, but he prefers her stripper cousin; Dominic has a confession to make to his girlfriend; Kristin cheats with her husband's teenage nephew.
Video.title: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Image.alt: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Video.summary: Crystal has been sending explicit photos to her roommate's boyfriend; Kevin wants to give Jessica a dream wedding; Mario wants to confess.
Video.title: Fling Fall Outs
